Raj Nagar Extension's Most Trusted Hyperlocal Marketing Partner

RNEx Consultancy LLP is the leading hyperlocal marketing and community engagement agency operating exclusively in Raj Nagar Extension, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh (PIN 201017). With 4+ years of on-ground presence, we have built the most extensive resident network in the area — covering 90+ residential apartment complexes, 250,000+ residents and 40,000+ direct community contacts across 100+ WhatsApp and community groups.

Businesses across Ghaziabad and NCR partner with us to advertise in Raj Nagar Extension, promote their brand inside apartment societies, and get listed in our widely distributed local business directory. Whether you are a hospital, clinic, school, restaurant, real estate developer, retailer, service provider or startup — we are your fastest route to community customers in Raj Nagar Extension.

Our services include the Local Map of Raj Nagar Extension, the Raj Nagar Extension Business Directory (distributed to 70,000+ homes), canopy activations inside societies, managed community outreach and our Hyperlocal Accessibility Service connecting residents to local businesses near them.

About RNEx

Built on 4 Years of
Community Trust

RNEx Consultancy LLP was founded to bridge a gap that no digital platform could fill — trusted, face-to-face access to tightly-knit residential communities. We are not a marketing agency. We are your community partners.

Based at Raj Nagar Extension, Ghaziabad — one of NCR's most densely populated residential corridors — we have spent years building genuine relationships with residents, apartment associations, RWA officials, and local administration across 90+ complexes.

Our community network spans 100+ groups covering topics from business and health to carpooling, book exchange, blood donation, and more. When your business enters this network, it enters with a warm introduction — not a cold advertisement.

Our Services

Everything You Need to Reach the Community

From apartment events to managed calling — we handle the access, you focus on closing.

🏘️

Community Access

Facilitation of meetings, small gatherings, and activations inside apartment complexes — coordinated with association officials and RWA leaders.

90+ complexes accessible
📞

Managed Outreach

Calling, lead generation, and appointment setting by our in-house team on your behalf. Resident data is never shared — we protect community trust.

40,000+ contact database
🎪

Event Facilitation

End-to-end coordination of on-campus and off-campus activations — standees, canopies, clubhouse sessions, stall setup. Space charges billed on actual or at our bulk rate.

Pass-through or bulk rates
📋

Business Advisory

Strategy support for local market entry, community-specific positioning, messaging, and growth planning. Backed by real market knowledge — not generic advice.

From idea to execution
🤝

Community Relations

Ongoing relationship management with RWA officials, apartment association dignitaries, local influencers, and administration on your behalf.

Built over 4+ years
🗺️

Map & Directory

Professional cartography-led local maps and printed apartment directories — distributed free to all residents with your business featured prominently.

Apartment-level precision

Local Map & Directory

Raj Nagar Extension's First Apartment-Level Directory

Leveraging Mr Deepanshu Mittal's 15+ years of professional cartography experience, RNEx is producing a printed Local Map & Apartment Directory distributed free to all residents across Raj Nagar Extension.

The directory features an apartment-wise locality map, local services guide, business classifieds, and sponsored sections — making it the most useful document a resident will keep at home all year.

For advertisers, it's unmatched visibility: not an ad that disappears in 5 seconds, but a physical page in every home across 90+ apartment complexes.

Apartment-wise MapsEach complex, roads, landmarks
Business ClassifiedsPaid listings for local services
Sponsored SectionsHealth, finance, education
QR ProfilesDigital link from print ad
Free DistributionEvery resident, every complex

Business Associate Network

Partner with Us. Build Your Own Income.

If you have strong local credibility in your residential locality anywhere in India, partner with RNEx and run the same model in your pin code — with our brand, systems, and support behind you.

Model A — Revenue Share Associate

Start with Zero Investment

Best for motivated network-builders who want to earn on performance with no upfront commitment. Bring clients, we handle billing, collections, and operations.

Upfront feeNone
Retainer share40–50%
Revenue share cut30–35%
Directory ad share40%
Territory exclusivityNo
5 clients at avg ₹30K retainer = earn ₹60K–75K/month + revenue share + directory income
Model B — Franchise Associate

Own Your Territory

For serious entrepreneurs who want pin code exclusivity, higher earnings, and the ability to build a team. Full playbook and priority support from RNEx.

Onboarding fee₹25K – 50K
Retainer share55–60%
Revenue share cut40–45%
Directory ad share50%
Territory exclusivityYes — 2 years
8 clients at avg ₹35K retainer = earn ₹1.54L–1.68L/month + revenue share + directory + sub-associate income

Privacy Policy Terms Disclaimer

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

1. Introduction

RNEx Consultancy LLP ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website www.rnexconsultancy.com or engage with our services.

2. Information We Collect

  • Personal Identification Information: Name, email address, phone number, and business details submitted via our contact form.
  • Usage Data: Information about how you interact with our website, including pages visited and time spent.
  • Communication Data: Records of communications between you and RNEx Consultancy LLP.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to: respond to your enquiries; provide and improve our services; send relevant business communications; comply with legal obligations; and maintain records of business relationships.

4. Data Protection

We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Resident contact data in our community database is never shared with third parties and is used solely for managed outreach on behalf of our clients.

5. Third-Party Disclosure

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties without your consent, except as required to provide our services or as required by law.

6. Cookies

Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You may choose to disable cookies through your browser settings.

7. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information held by us. To exercise these rights, contact us at info@rnexconsultancy.com.

8. Contact

RNEx Consultancy LLP, D-502, Brave Hearts Apartments, Raj Nagar Extension, Ghaziabad, UP – 201017. Email: info@rnexconsultancy.com

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: May 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using the website www.rnexconsultancy.com or engaging the services of RNEx Consultancy LLP (LLPIN: ACY-4699), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

2. Services

RNEx Consultancy LLP provides hyperlocal business consultancy, community access facilitation, managed outreach, event facilitation, local map and directory services, and business advisory services. All service engagements are subject to a separate written agreement signed by both parties.

3. Fees and Payment

All engagements begin with a one-time non-refundable onboarding fee of INR 10,000. Monthly retainer fees are as per the agreed tier. Payments are due within 7 days of invoice date. Late payments may attract interest at 18% per annum.

4. Confidentiality

All information shared between RNEx Consultancy LLP and its clients is treated as confidential. Neither party shall disclose the other's confidential information to third parties without prior written consent.

5. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and maps, is the intellectual property of RNEx Consultancy LLP and may not be reproduced without written permission.

6. Limitation of Liability

RNEx Consultancy LLP shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services or website. Our total liability in any matter shall not exceed the fees paid in the preceding month.

7. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh.

8. Amendments

RNEx Consultancy LLP reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting to the website.

9. Contact

For queries regarding these Terms: info@rnexconsultancy.com

Disclaimer

Last updated: May 2026

General Information

The information provided on this website (www.rnexconsultancy.com) is for general informational purposes only. While we endeavour to keep information accurate and up to date, RNEx Consultancy LLP makes no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, or suitability of the information contained herein.

Business Results

Any earning examples, income projections, or business results mentioned on this website are illustrative only and not guarantees of performance. Actual results will vary based on individual effort, market conditions, and other factors.

Community Network

Access to community networks, apartment associations, and RWA bodies is facilitated through our relationships and is subject to the consent and cooperation of the relevant community bodies. RNEx Consultancy LLP does not guarantee access to any specific community or apartment complex.

Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We have no control over the content of those sites and accept no responsibility for them or for any loss or damage arising from your use of them.

Professional Advice

Nothing on this website constitutes legal, financial, or professional advice. For specific advice relevant to your circumstances, please consult a qualified professional.

Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, RNEx Consultancy LLP excludes all liability for any loss or damage arising from the use of this website or reliance on any information provided herein.

Contact

Questions about this Disclaimer: info@rnexconsultancy.com
